name: pi-skills
description: Tooling root for pi-skills: lint, format, and pre-commit hooks. The skills/extensions themselves are built via the Makefile.

scripts.typecheck: scripts/check-extensions.py extensions/async-bash extensions/btw extensions/evidence extensions/file-guards extensions/hook-coordinator extensions/planning-cast extensions/primary-agents extensions/question extensions/ralph-loop extensions/session-lock extensions/shared extensions/spec-graph extensions/stats extensions/subagents extensions/telegram extensions/ui-cosmetics extensions/ultrawork
